theme.description: A caring, warm, trustworthy environment for pet care creators in light mode, switching to a premium, deep starry navy blue in dark mode for a cinematic, supportive focus.

rules.headings_weight: Use font-semibold or font-medium for Cormorant Garamond to retain its elegant curves without feeling too heavy.
rules.body_weight: Use font-normal for body, font-medium for buttons and small labels.
rules.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.

rules.generous_spacing: Use 2x typical spacing to create breathing room. Surfaces must have internal padding (e.g., p-6) to prevent text collision.
rules.mobile_first: Always start with single column layouts, scaling up with sm: and lg: breakpoints.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white (light) / text-background (dark) rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md
buttons.outline: border border-border bg-transparent text-text_primary hover:bg-surface_secondary rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

cards.default: bg-surface rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm transition-all overflow-hidden

chips.default: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-surface_secondary border border-border text-text_secondary cursor-pointer hover:bg-border transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-text_primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:border-primary transition-all
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-text_primary mb-1.5

draggable_blocks.container: bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg p-4 shadow-sm cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors flex flex-col gap-2 relative

phone_frame.container: relative mx-auto border-gray-800 dark:border-gray-800 bg-gray-800 border-[14px] rounded-[2.5rem] h-[600px] w-[300px] shadow-xl overflow-hidden
phone_frame.notch: w-[148px] h-[18px] bg-gray-800 absolute top-0 rounded-b-[1rem] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-20

layout.navbar: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-surface/80 border-b border-border shadow-sm
layout.main_grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] overflow-hidden
layout.sidebar_left: lg:col-span-3 h-full overflow-y-auto border-r border-border p-4 bg-surface_secondary/30
layout.canvas: lg:col-span-6 h-full overflow-y-auto p-6 bg-background relative
layout.sidebar_right: lg:col-span-3 h-full overflow-y-auto border-l border-border p-4 bg-surface

motion.page_transition: framer-motion opacity-0 y-4 to opacity-100 y-0 duration-300

starfield_background.css: .dark-starfield { background-image: radial-gradient(white, rgba(255,255,255,.2) 2px, transparent 40px), radial-gradient(white, rgba(255,255,255,.15) 1px, transparent 30px), radial-gradient(white, rgba(255,255,255,.1) 2px, transparent 40px), radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.4), rgba(255,255,255,.1) 2px, transparent 30px); background-size: 550px 550px, 350px 350px, 250px 250px, 150px 150px; background-position: 0 0, 40px 60px, 130px 270px, 70px 100px; opacity: 0.15; }

image_urls.description: White dog and gray cat hugging each other on grass
A heartwarming moment of a cat cuddling a dog on green grass outdoors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Cormorant Garamond and Manrope fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement the theme toggle strictly adhering to the exact hex codes provided for Light and Dark modes. Do not use generic tailwind grays.
For Dark Mode, inject the .dark-starfield CSS class into a fixed background div under the main layout.
Build the 3-pane Layout Builder view (Left Sidebar, Canvas, Right Sidebar) as the primary editing interface.
Use @hello-pangea/dnd for dragging layout blocks onto the Canvas.
Ensure all buttons, chips, and draggable cards have generous padding and smooth hover transitions.
Implement the Finalize & Export view with a toggle between desktop view and the specific mobile 'phone_frame' container classes defined here.
Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
